messages.content: I'm great—thanks! From earlier suggestions, top picks are Bali (stunning beaches and affordable stays), Lisbon (warm, charming city with budget-friendly food), and Kyoto (peaceful temples and rich culture). Which one sounds exciting?

steps.prompt: Web Search: I'm great—thanks! Ready to help plan your next trip. What would you like to do today?
steps.response: December 13, 2025 - #10 I had such a great time on our wonderful trip together to [Location]. Thank you for inviting me and using your hotel points. That saved both of us a lot of money, and I was grateful to be able to spend more doing activities. I am ready to plan the next trip! 2 weeks ago - "What time does the next bus leave?" helps you plan your schedule and avoid long waits. Hotels are pretty straightforward, but knowing the right phrases makes everything smoother. "I have a reservation under your name" tells the front desk you've already booked. They'll look up your information and give you your room key. "I'd like to check in, please" works if you're arriving and ready to access your room.
